conversation_history.assistant: What can I assist you with today, Boss?
I'm JARVIS, Tony Stark's advanced personal AI assistant.
Wake-up is a feature that allows you to start my services when your computer is turned on.
Okay, Boss. I'll be available again once we're back online.

conversation_history.user: Ok Jarvis of God of War playing
conversation_history.assistant: Ah, a gamer, eh? Enjoying God of War, are you?
Later, Boss! Still got your back!
Okay, Boss. I'll be available again once we're back online.
